title: The No-Nonsense Guide to How Bangladeshi Freelancers Accept International Payments: What You Need to Know
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: You're a Bangladeshi freelancer struggling to get paid by clients outside the country. Despite having a talent for creating digital products like ebooks, courses, and software, you're stuck with a problem that's costing you money and stress: how to accept international payments. You've tried PayPal, but it's blocked in Bangladesh. You've tried Stripe, but it's not available to you. You've even tried local banks, but they're a hassle to deal with. You need a solution that's fast, secure, and reliable. That's where Unchained Commerce comes in.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The key to accepting international payments is to use blockchain-based payment systems that don't rely on traditional banks or payment processors. Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect is a game-changer for freelancers like you. It connects you directly with your clients, allowing you to receive payments in a matter of seconds. Unlike traditional payment processors, Web3 Wallet Connect doesn't require you to create an account or go through a lengthy verification process. It's fast, secure, and reliable – exactly what you need to get paid by clients outside Bangladesh.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you can start accepting international payments with Web3 Wallet Connect, you'll need a few things. First, you'll need to create a Web3 Wallet Connect account, which is free. Next, you'll need to set up a payment gateway like NOWPayments, which supports over 300 cryptocurrencies. You'll also need to create a product to sell, such as an ebook or course. Finally, you'll need to configure your Web3 Wallet Connect account to connect with your payment gateway and product. Don't worry, it's easier than it sounds.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

Setting up your payment and delivery pipeline with Web3 Wallet Connect is a straightforward process. First, you'll need to create a new product in your Web3 Wallet Connect dashboard and configure its payment settings. Next, you'll need to connect your payment gateway to your Web3 Wallet Connect account. Finally, you'll need to set up your delivery pipeline, which will automatically deliver your product to your clients once payment is received. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can automate the entire process, so you can focus on what matters most: creating great digital products.
Web3 Wallet Connect supports over 300 cryptocurrencies, giving you flexibility and freedom when it comes to accepting payments.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've set up your payment and delivery pipeline, it's time to go live and make your first sale. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can easily create a sales page for your product and share it with your clients. When a client makes a payment, Web3 Wallet Connect will automatically deliver your product to them. You'll receive an email notification with a link to view the transaction, and you can track your sales in real-time. Making your first sale with Web3 Wallet Connect is a breeze.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Once you've made your first sale with Web3 Wallet Connect, you can start scaling your business. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can easily add new products, payment gateways, and delivery pipelines to your account. You can also track your sales and analytics in real-time, so you can make informed decisions about your business. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can grow your business as much as you want, without worrying about payment issues or slow delivery.

Will Web3 Wallet Connect work with my Bangladeshi bank account? Web3 Wallet Connect is a blockchain-based payment system that doesn't rely on traditional banks or payment processors, so you don't need a bank account to use it. You can receive payments directly in your Web3 Wallet Connect account, which supports over 300 cryptocurrencies. You can then exchange your cryptocurrency for your local currency through a crypto exchange or wallet.
You don't need a bank account to use Web3 Wallet Connect – you can receive payments directly in your Web3 Wallet Connect account.
